title: Concept for a Study Protocol focusing on Recruitment, Fieldwork and Sampling
author: Fiddicke, Ulrike
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This concept for a Study Protocol introduces a phases-concept to facilitate the evolution of environmental studies. It provides a template or model for the conduct of human biomonitoring (HBM) studies while focussing on recruitment, fieldwork, and sampling. It can be used for both the setup of new studies as well as to check protocols of already ongoing studies. This concept aims to address all steps that are worth considering when preparing a HBM study and provides a model to help identifying and filling such a study's different phases. 
This document is also included as an annex in HBM4EU Deliverable D7.3.
